items.name: Kokiri Sword
items.description: The starting sword obtained in the Kokiri Forest from the small maze behind the training area.

items.name: Deku Shield
items.description: Purchase from the Kokiri Shop in the Kokiri Forest for 40 Rupees, or find it in various chests.

items.name: Hylian Shield
items.description: Purchase from the Bazaar in Castle Town or Kakariko Village as a child, or find it in a chest in the graveyard.

items.name: Mirror Shield
items.description: Found in the Spirit Temple as an adult. The Mirror Shield reflects light and deflects certain attacks.

items.name: Master Sword
items.description: The legendary sword that seals the darkness, obtained from the Temple of Time after collecting the three Spiritual Stones.

items.name: Biggoron's Sword
items.description: A two-handed sword that deals more damage than the Master Sword. Obtained through a trading sequence quest as an adult.

items.name: Fairy Slingshot
items.description: Obtained in the Great Deku Tree dungeon as a child. It allows you to shoot Deku Seeds at enemies and targets.

items.name: Boomerang
items.description: Found in Inside Jabu-Jabu’s Belly. The Boomerang stuns enemies and retrieves distant items as a child.

items.name: Bombs
items.description: Found in Dodongo’s Cavern. Bombs are used to blow up walls, obstacles, and enemies.

items.name: Bombchu
items.description: Small mechanical bombs that move along the ground and up walls. Can be won at the Bombchu Bowling Alley.

items.name: Bow
items.description: Found in the Forest Temple as an adult. It allows you to shoot arrows at enemies, targets, and switches.

items.name: Hookshot
items.description: Obtained in Kakariko Village after completing Dampé's graveyard race as an adult. Use it to grapple onto distant objects and enemies.

items.name: Longshot
items.description: An upgraded Hookshot with a longer reach. Found in the Water Temple.

items.name: Megaton Hammer
items.description: Found in the Fire Temple as an adult. The Megaton Hammer is used to smash obstacles and switches.

items.name: Lens of Truth
items.description: Found in the Bottom of the Well. It reveals hidden objects, paths, and enemies.

items.name: Ocarina of Time
items.description: Given to you by Princess Zelda before fleeing Hyrule Castle. Used to play various melodies that affect the world.

items.name: Magic Beans
items.description: Purchased from the Magic Bean salesman in Zora’s River. These beans can be planted as a child and grow into platforms as an adult.

items.name: Spiritual Stone of Forest (Kokiri's Emerald)
items.description: Given by the Great Deku Tree after completing the Deku Tree dungeon. One of three Spiritual Stones needed to open the Door of Time.

items.name: Spiritual Stone of Fire (Goron's Ruby)
items.description: Given by Darunia after completing Dodongo’s Cavern. One of three Spiritual Stones needed to open the Door of Time.

items.name: Spiritual Stone of Water (Zora's Sapphire)
items.description: Given by Princess Ruto after rescuing her from Inside Jabu-Jabu’s Belly. One of three Spiritual Stones needed to open the Door of Time.

items.name: Light Medallion
items.description: Received from Rauru after pulling the Master Sword. One of six medallions obtained from the Sages.

items.name: Forest Medallion
items.description: Received from Saria after defeating Phantom Ganon in the Forest Temple. One of six medallions obtained from the Sages.

items.name: Fire Medallion
items.description: Received from Darunia after defeating Volvagia in the Fire Temple. One of six medallions obtained from the Sages.

items.name: Water Medallion
items.description: Received from Princess Ruto after defeating Morpha in the Water Temple. One of six medallions obtained from the Sages.

items.name: Shadow Medallion
items.description: Received from Impa after defeating Bongo Bongo in the Shadow Temple. One of six medallions obtained from the Sages.

items.name: Spirit Medallion
items.description: Received from Nabooru after defeating Twinrova in the Spirit Temple. One of six medallions obtained from the Sages.

items.name: Goron’s Bracelet
items.description: Given by Darunia after playing Saria's Song. Allows you to lift Bomb Flowers.

items.name: Silver Gauntlets
items.description: Found in the Spirit Temple as a child. Allows you to lift heavier objects as an adult.

items.name: Golden Gauntlets
items.description: Found in Ganon’s Castle. Allows you to lift the heaviest objects in the game.

items.name: Silver Scale
items.description: Won in the diving mini-game in Zora's Domain. Allows you to dive deeper underwater.

items.name: Golden Scale
items.description: Win the adult fishing game with a large fish to get the Golden Scale, which lets you dive even deeper.

items.name: Iron Boots
items.description: Found in the Ice Cavern. The Iron Boots allow you to sink to the bottom of water areas.

items.name: Hover Boots
items.description: Found in the Shadow Temple. Hover Boots allow you to walk on air for a short time.

items.name: Deku Nuts
items.description: Found throughout the game, Deku Nuts stun enemies when thrown.

items.name: Deku Sticks
items.description: Found throughout the game as a child. They can be used as a temporary weapon or to light torches.

items.name: Fire Arrows
items.description: Shoot an arrow at the rising sun on Lake Hylia after completing the Water Temple to receive the Fire Arrows.

items.name: Ice Arrows
items.description: Found in the Gerudo Training Ground. Ice Arrows freeze enemies upon impact.

items.name: Light Arrows
items.description: Received from Zelda after collecting all six medallions. Light Arrows are used to defeat Ganondorf.

items.name: Din's Fire
items.description: Obtained from the Great Fairy in Hyrule Castle. Din’s Fire creates a powerful fire blast around Link.

items.name: Farore's Wind
items.description: Obtained from the Great Fairy in Zora’s Fountain. Farore’s Wind allows you to create warp points in dungeons.

items.name: Nayru's Love
items.description: Obtained from the Great Fairy in the Desert Colossus. Nayru’s Love creates a temporary protective barrier around Link.
